productive_behavior: The input remained unchanged and both Qwen and Gemma planning output streamed with live artifact access.
Gemma passed all five independent plan-audit criteria.
The controller withheld execution while deterministic plan lint remained unresolved and failed closed after four bounded repairs.
release_blockers: The semantic-arm regex searched across sentence boundaries, joining a valid explicit mapping dictionary to the next sentence's hard-stop prohibition on lexical or alphabetical inference.
Later repairs put the prohibited inference wording in the same method and stop-condition safety clauses; the regex still treated those negated safeguards as affirmative arm assignment.
All four repair rounds therefore preserved the exact requested safety contract while receiving the same arbitrary_semantic_arm_mapping finding, so no scientific computation was allowed to start.
implemented_repairs: Semantic-arm lint now evaluates sentence and clause-local text rather than matching across punctuation boundaries.
Explicit never, must-not, do-not, cannot, and without mapping prohibitions are excluded while affirmative lexical/order- and observed-value-based assignments remain blocking.
Regression tests cover the exact live mapping dictionary plus hard-stop wording and retain both order-based and higher-baseline negative controls.
disposition: Rejected fail-closed run retained as negative evidence. The plan was scientifically adequate and independently passed, but a deterministic negation/boundary false positive exhausted every repair before execution.
